mapper.select: SELECT * FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND collector_user_id = #{collectorUserId}
SELECT * FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId}
SELECT * FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT DISTINCT collector_emp_no FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId}
SELECT * FROM collection_task WHERE monitoring_id = #{monitoringId} AND collector_user_id = #{collectorUserId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO collection_task (monitoring_id, indicator_id, institution_id, collector_name, collector_emp_no, collector_user_id, status, file_key, collection_indicator_name, collection_unit, collection_dimension, collection_category) VALUES
(#{item.monitoringId}, #{item.indicatorId}, #{item.institutionId}, #{item.collectorName}, #{item.collectorEmpNo}, #{item.collectorUserId}, #{item.status}, #{item.fileKey}, #{item.collectionIndicatorName}, #{item.collectionUnit}, #{item.collectionDimension}, #{item.collectionCategory})
mapper.update: UPDATE collection_task SET actual_value=#{actualValue}, status=#{status}, submitted_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE collection_task SET status=#{status}, approved_by=#{approvedBy}, approved_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE collection_task SET status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, approved_by=#{approvedBy}, approved_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE collection_task SET file_key=#{fileKey} WHERE monitoring_id=#{monitoringId} AND collector_user_id=#{collectorUserId}
